tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE Scratch ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

LOCAL INSTANCE NaturalsInduction

SafeAtBody(SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : VotedFor(a,c,w) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a,d)

\* State-parametric version of the SafeAt body: MB plays the role of maxBal,
\* VT the role of votes.  Its definition mentions no state variable, so
\* (GSafeAt(maxBal,votes,b,v))' = GSafeAt(maxBal',votes',b,v) by argument priming.
GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]

GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) ==
   LET SA[bb \in Ballot] == GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v)
   IN  SA[b]

LEMMA SafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == SafeAtBody(g, n, v)
           SA[bb \in Nat] == Def(SA, bb)
<1>1. ASSUME NEW mm \in Nat, NEW gg, NEW hh, \A i \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[i] = hh[i]
      PROVE  Def(gg, mm) = Def(hh, mm)
   <2>0. \A c \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[c] = hh[c]
      BY <1>1
   <2>1. SafeAtBody(gg, mm, v) = SafeAtBody(hh, mm, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>0 DEF SafeAtBody
   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = SafeAt(bb, v)
   BY DEF SafeAt, SafeAtBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]
   BY <1>1, RecursiveFcnOfNat, Isa
<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = SafeAtBody(SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

LEMMA SafeAtUnfold ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) <=>
           \/ b = 0
           \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
                /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
                /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                     /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                          VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                     /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
<1>1. SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
   BY SafeAtDef
<1>2. \A c \in 0..(b-1) : [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)][c] = SafeAt(c, v)
   BY DEF Ballot
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF SafeAtBody

LEMMA SafeAtSound ==
  \A b \in Ballot : \A v \in Value :
     SafeAt(b, v) => \A c \in 0..(b-1) : \A w \in Value : ChosenIn(c, w) => (w = v)
<1> DEFINE P(bb) == \A vv \in Value :
                       SafeAt(bb, vv) =>
                          \A cc \in 0..(bb-1) : \A ww \in Value :
                             ChosenIn(cc, ww) => (ww = vv)
<1>1. \A n \in Nat : (\A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)) => P(n)
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)
               PROVE  P(n)
      OBVIOUS
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value, SafeAt(n, v),
                       NEW c \in 0..(n-1), NEW w \in Value, ChosenIn(c, w)
               PROVE  w = v
      BY DEF P
   <2>1. n # 0
      OBVIOUS
   <2>2. \E Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                 /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>1, SafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
   <2>3. PICK Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                 /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>2
   <2>4. PICK cc \in -1..(n-1) :
            /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                  VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
            /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>3
   <2>5. PICK Qc \in Quorum : \A a \in Qc : VotedFor(a, c, w)
      BY DEF ChosenIn
   <2>6. \E a \in Q : a \in Qc
      BY <2>3, <2>5, QA
   <2>7. PICK astar \in Q : astar \in Qc
      BY <2>6
   <2>8. VotedFor(astar, c, w)
      BY <2>5, <2>7
   <2>9. ~(c \in (cc+1)..(n-1))
      <3>1. ASSUME c \in (cc+1)..(n-1) PROVE FALSE
         <4>1. DidNotVoteIn(astar, c)
            BY <2>4, <2>7, <3>1
         <4>2. QED
            BY <4>1, <2>8 DEF DidNotVoteIn
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>10. c \leq cc
      BY <2>4, <2>9
   <2>11. cc # -1
      BY <2>10
   <2>12. /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
          /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value : VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
      BY <2>4, <2>11
   <2>13. CASE c = cc
      BY <2>7, <2>8, <2>12, <2>13
   <2>14. CASE c < cc
      <3>1. cc \in 0..(n-1)
         BY <2>4, <2>11
      <3>2. P(cc)
         BY <3>1
      <3>3. SafeAt(cc, v) =>
               \A c1 \in 0..(cc-1) : \A ww \in Value : ChosenIn(c1, ww) => (ww = v)
         BY <3>2 DEF P
      <3>4. c \in 0..(cc-1)
         BY <2>14
      <3>5. QED
         BY <2>12, <3>3, <3>4
   <2>15. QED
      BY <2>10, <2>13, <2>14
<1>2. \A n \in Nat : P(n)
   <2> DEFINE f == [k \in Nat |-> \A m \in 0..k : P(m)]
   <2>1. \A k \in Nat : f[k] = (\A m \in 0..k : P(m))
      BY DEF f
   <2>2. f[0]
      BY <1>1, <2>1
   <2>3. \A k \in Nat : f[k] => f[k+1]
      <3>1. ASSUME NEW k \in Nat, f[k] PROVE f[k+1]
         <4>1. \A m \in 0..k : P(m)
            BY <3>1, <2>1
         <4>2. P(k+1)
            BY <1>1, <4>1
         <4>3. \A m \in 0..(k+1) : P(m)
            BY <4>1, <4>2
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>3, <2>1
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>4. \A k \in Nat : f[k]
      BY <2>2, <2>3, SimpleNatInduction
   <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <2>1
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>2 DEF Ballot

LEMMA GSafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) =
            GBody(MB, VT, [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)], b, v)
<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == GBody(MB, VT, g, n, v)
           SA[bb \in Nat] == Def(SA, bb)
<1>1. ASSUME NEW mm \in Nat, NEW gg, NEW hh, \A i \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[i] = hh[i]
      PROVE  Def(gg, mm) = Def(hh, mm)
   <2>0. \A c \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[c] = hh[c]
      BY <1>1
   <2>1. GBody(MB, VT, gg, mm, v) = GBody(MB, VT, hh, mm, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>0 DEF GBody
   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)
   BY DEF GSafeAt, GBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]
   BY <1>1, RecursiveFcnOfNat, Isa
<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = GBody(MB, VT, SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

LEMMA GSafeAtUnfold ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) <=>
           \/ b = 0
           \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
                /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq b
                /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                     /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                          (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                     /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                           <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
<1>1. GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) =
         GBody(MB, VT, [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)], b, v)
   BY GSafeAtDef
<1>2. \A c \in 0..(b-1) : [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)][c] = GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
   BY DEF Ballot
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF GBody

LEMMA SafeAtIsG ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) = GSafeAt(maxBal, votes, b, v)
BY DEF SafeAt, GSafeAt, SafeAtBody, GBody, VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn

LEMMA SafeAtIsGPrime ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)' = GSafeAt(maxBal', votes', b, v)
BY DEF SafeAt, GSafeAt, SafeAtBody, GBody, VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn

LEMMA GSafeStable ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW MB2, NEW VT2,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB[a] \in Int,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB2[a] \in Int,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB[a] \leq MB2[a],
         \A a \in Acceptor, e \in Ballot, w \in Value :
            (<<e, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (<<e, w>> \in VT[a] \/ MB[a] \leq e)
  PROVE  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
            GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) => GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, b, v)
<1> DEFINE P(bb) == \A vv \in Value :
                       GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, vv) => GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, bb, vv)
<1>1. \A n \in Nat : (\A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)) => P(n)
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)
               PROVE  P(n)
      OBVIOUS
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value, GSafeAt(MB, VT, n, v)
               PROVE  GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, n, v)
      BY DEF P
   <2>1. CASE n = 0
      BY <2>1, GSafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
   <2>2. CASE n # 0
      <3>1. \E Q \in Quorum :
               /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq n
               /\ \E c \in -1..(n-1) :
                    /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                   /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                         (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                    /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
         BY <2>2, GSafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
      <3>2. PICK Q \in Quorum :
               /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq n
               /\ \E c \in -1..(n-1) :
                    /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                   /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                         (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                    /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
         BY <3>1
      <3>3. PICK c \in -1..(n-1) :
               /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                              /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
               /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
         BY <3>2
      <3>4. \A a \in Q : a \in Acceptor
         BY <3>2, QA
      <3>5. \A a \in Q : MB2[a] \geq n
         BY <3>2, <3>4
      <3>6. (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, c, v)
                        /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
         <4> SUFFICES ASSUME c # -1 PROVE
                /\ GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, c, v)
                /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
            OBVIOUS
         <4>0. c \in 0..(n-1)
            BY <3>3
         <4>1. /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
               /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
            BY <3>3
         <4>2. GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, c, v)
            <5>1. P(c)
               BY <4>0
            <5>2. QED
               BY <4>1, <5>1 DEF P
         <4>3. \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
            <5>1. ASSUME NEW a \in Q, NEW w \in Value, <<c, w>> \in VT2[a]
                  PROVE  w = v
               <6>1. a \in Acceptor
                  BY <3>4, <5>1
               <6>2. MB[a] \geq n
                  BY <3>2, <5>1
               <6>3. ~(MB[a] \leq c)
                  BY <4>0, <6>2
               <6>4. c \in Ballot
                  BY <4>0 DEF Ballot
               <6>5. <<c, w>> \in VT[a]
                  BY <5>1, <6>1, <6>3, <6>4
               <6>6. QED
                  BY <4>1, <5>1, <6>5
            <5>2. QED
               BY <5>1
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>2, <4>3
      <3>7. \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT2[a]
         <4>1. ASSUME NEW d \in (c+1)..(n-1), NEW a \in Q, NEW w \in Value
               PROVE  <<d, w>> \notin VT2[a]
            <5>1. a \in Acceptor
               BY <3>4, <4>1
            <5>2. MB[a] \geq n
               BY <3>2, <4>1
            <5>3. ~(MB[a] \leq d)
               BY <4>1, <5>2
            <5>4. <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
               BY <3>3, <4>1
            <5>5. d \in Ballot
               BY <4>1 DEF Ballot
            <5>6. QED
               BY <4>1, <5>1, <5>3, <5>4, <5>5
         <4>2. QED
            BY <4>1
      <3>8. \E QQ \in Quorum :
               /\ \A a \in QQ : MB2[a] \geq n
               /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                    /\ (cc # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, cc, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in QQ : \A w \in Value :
                                          (<<cc, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
                    /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in QQ : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT2[a]
         BY <3>2, <3>3, <3>5, <3>6, <3>7
      <3>9. QED
         BY <2>2, <3>8, GSafeAtUnfold
   <2>3. QED
      BY <2>1, <2>2
<1>2. \A n \in Nat : P(n)
   <2> DEFINE f == [k \in Nat |-> \A m \in 0..k : P(m)]
   <2>1. \A k \in Nat : f[k] = (\A m \in 0..k : P(m))
      BY DEF f
   <2>2. f[0]
      BY <1>1, <2>1
   <2>3. \A k \in Nat : f[k] => f[k+1]
      <3>1. ASSUME NEW k \in Nat, f[k] PROVE f[k+1]
         <4>1. \A m \in 0..k : P(m)
            BY <3>1, <2>1
         <4>2. P(k+1)
            BY <1>1, <4>1
         <4>3. \A m \in 0..(k+1) : P(m)
            BY <4>1, <4>2
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>3, <2>1
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>4. \A k \in Nat : f[k]
      BY <2>2, <2>3, SimpleNatInduction
   <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <2>1
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>2 DEF Ballot

THEOREM VT3 == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF OMITTED
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE Scratch ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

LOCAL INSTANCE NaturalsInduction

SafeAtBody(SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : VotedFor(a,c,w) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a,d)

\* State-parametric version of the SafeAt body: MB plays the role of maxBal,
\* VT the role of votes.  Its definition mentions no state variable, so
\* (GSafeAt(maxBal,votes,b,v))' = GSafeAt(maxBal',votes',b,v) by argument priming.
GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]

GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) ==
   LET SA[bb \in Ballot] == GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v)
   IN  SA[b]

LEMMA SafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == SafeAtBody(g, n, v)
           SA[bb \in Nat] == Def(SA, bb)
<1>1. ASSUME NEW mm \in Nat, NEW gg, NEW hh, \A i \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[i] = hh[i]
      PROVE  Def(gg, mm) = Def(hh, mm)
   <2>0. \A c \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[c] = hh[c]
      BY <1>1
   <2>1. SafeAtBody(gg, mm, v) = SafeAtBody(hh, mm, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>0 DEF SafeAtBody
   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = SafeAt(bb, v)
   BY DEF SafeAt, SafeAtBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]
   BY <1>1, RecursiveFcnOfNat, Isa
<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = SafeAtBody(SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

LEMMA SafeAtUnfold ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) <=>
           \/ b = 0
           \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
                /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
                /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                     /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                          VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                     /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
<1>1. SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
   BY SafeAtDef
<1>2. \A c \in 0..(b-1) : [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)][c] = SafeAt(c, v)
   BY DEF Ballot
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF SafeAtBody

LEMMA SafeAtSound ==
  \A b \in Ballot : \A v \in Value :
     SafeAt(b, v) => \A c \in 0..(b-1) : \A w \in Value : ChosenIn(c, w) => (w = v)
<1> DEFINE P(bb) == \A vv \in Value :
                       SafeAt(bb, vv) =>
                          \A cc \in 0..(bb-1) : \A ww \in Value :
                             ChosenIn(cc, ww) => (ww = vv)
<1>1. \A n \in Nat : (\A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)) => P(n)
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)
               PROVE  P(n)
      OBVIOUS
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value, SafeAt(n, v),
                       NEW c \in 0..(n-1), NEW w \in Value, ChosenIn(c, w)
               PROVE  w = v
      BY DEF P
   <2>1. n # 0
      OBVIOUS
   <2>2. \E Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                 /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>1, SafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
   <2>3. PICK Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                 /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>2
   <2>4. PICK cc \in -1..(n-1) :
            /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                  VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
            /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>3
   <2>5. PICK Qc \in Quorum : \A a \in Qc : VotedFor(a, c, w)
      BY DEF ChosenIn
   <2>6. \E a \in Q : a \in Qc
      BY <2>3, <2>5, QA
   <2>7. PICK astar \in Q : astar \in Qc
      BY <2>6
   <2>8. VotedFor(astar, c, w)
      BY <2>5, <2>7
   <2>9. ~(c \in (cc+1)..(n-1))
      <3>1. ASSUME c \in (cc+1)..(n-1) PROVE FALSE
         <4>1. DidNotVoteIn(astar, c)
            BY <2>4, <2>7, <3>1
         <4>2. QED
            BY <4>1, <2>8 DEF DidNotVoteIn
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>10. c \leq cc
      BY <2>4, <2>9
   <2>11. cc # -1
      BY <2>10
   <2>12. /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
          /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value : VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
      BY <2>4, <2>11
   <2>13. CASE c = cc
      BY <2>7, <2>8, <2>12, <2>13
   <2>14. CASE c < cc
      <3>1. cc \in 0..(n-1)
         BY <2>4, <2>11
      <3>2. P(cc)
         BY <3>1
      <3>3. SafeAt(cc, v) =>
               \A c1 \in 0..(cc-1) : \A ww \in Value : ChosenIn(c1, ww) => (ww = v)
         BY <3>2 DEF P
      <3>4. c \in 0..(cc-1)
         BY <2>14
      <3>5. QED
         BY <2>12, <3>3, <3>4
   <2>15. QED
      BY <2>10, <2>13, <2>14
<1>2. \A n \in Nat : P(n)
   <2> DEFINE f == [k \in Nat |-> \A m \in 0..k : P(m)]
   <2>1. \A k \in Nat : f[k] = (\A m \in 0..k : P(m))
      BY DEF f
   <2>2. f[0]
      BY <1>1, <2>1
   <2>3. \A k \in Nat : f[k] => f[k+1]
      <3>1. ASSUME NEW k \in Nat, f[k] PROVE f[k+1]
         <4>1. \A m \in 0..k : P(m)
            BY <3>1, <2>1
         <4>2. P(k+1)
            BY <1>1, <4>1
         <4>3. \A m \in 0..(k+1) : P(m)
            BY <4>1, <4>2
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>3, <2>1
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>4. \A k \in Nat : f[k]
      BY <2>2, <2>3, SimpleNatInduction
   <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <2>1
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>2 DEF Ballot

LEMMA GSafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) =
            GBody(MB, VT, [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)], b, v)
<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == GBody(MB, VT, g, n, v)
           SA[bb \in Nat] == Def(SA, bb)
<1>1. ASSUME NEW mm \in Nat, NEW gg, NEW hh, \A i \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[i] = hh[i]
      PROVE  Def(gg, mm) = Def(hh, mm)
   <2>0. \A c \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[c] = hh[c]
      BY <1>1
   <2>1. GBody(MB, VT, gg, mm, v) = GBody(MB, VT, hh, mm, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>0 DEF GBody
   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)
   BY DEF GSafeAt, GBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]
   BY <1>1, RecursiveFcnOfNat, Isa
<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = GBody(MB, VT, SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

LEMMA GSafeAtUnfold ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) <=>
           \/ b = 0
           \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
                /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq b
                /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                     /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                          (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                     /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                           <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
<1>1. GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) =
         GBody(MB, VT, [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)], b, v)
   BY GSafeAtDef
<1>2. \A c \in 0..(b-1) : [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)][c] = GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
   BY DEF Ballot
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF GBody

LEMMA SafeAtIsG ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) = GSafeAt(maxBal, votes, b, v)
BY DEF SafeAt, GSafeAt, SafeAtBody, GBody, VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn

LEMMA SafeAtIsGPrime ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)' = GSafeAt(maxBal', votes', b, v)
BY DEF SafeAt, GSafeAt, SafeAtBody, GBody, VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn

LEMMA GSafeStable ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW MB2, NEW VT2,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB[a] \in Int,

<1> DEFINE P(bb) == \A vv \in Value :

<1>1. \A n \in Nat : (\A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)) => P(n)
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)
               PROVE  P(n)
      OBVIOUS
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value, GSafeAt(MB, VT, n, v)

      <3>1. \E Q \in Quorum :

                    /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)

      <3>3. PICK c \in -1..(n-1) :

               /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]

                /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
            OBVIOUS
         <4>0. c \in 0..(n-1)
            BY <3>3

                  PROVE  w = v
               <6>1. a \in Acceptor

               <6>2. MB[a] \geq n

               <6>3. ~(MB[a] \leq c)

               <6>5. <<c, w>> \in VT[a]

----------------------------- MODULE Scratch ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

LOCAL INSTANCE NaturalsInduction

SafeAtBody(SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : VotedFor(a,c,w) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a,d)

\* State-parametric version of the SafeAt body: MB plays the role of maxBal,
\* VT the role of votes.  Its definition mentions no state variable, so
\* (GSafeAt(maxBal,votes,b,v))' = GSafeAt(maxBal',votes',b,v) by argument priming.
GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]

GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) ==
   LET SA[bb \in Ballot] == GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v)
   IN  SA[b]

LEMMA SafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == SafeAtBody(g, n, v)
           SA[bb \in Nat] == Def(SA, bb)
<1>1. ASSUME NEW mm \in Nat, NEW gg, NEW hh, \A i \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[i] = hh[i]
      PROVE  Def(gg, mm) = Def(hh, mm)
   <2>0. \A c \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[c] = hh[c]
      BY <1>1
   <2>1. SafeAtBody(gg, mm, v) = SafeAtBody(hh, mm, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>0 DEF SafeAtBody
   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = SafeAt(bb, v)
   BY DEF SafeAt, SafeAtBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]
   BY <1>1, RecursiveFcnOfNat, Isa
<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = SafeAtBody(SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

LEMMA SafeAtUnfold ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) <=>
           \/ b = 0
           \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
                /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
                /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                     /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                          VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                     /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
<1>1. SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
   BY SafeAtDef
<1>2. \A c \in 0..(b-1) : [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)][c] = SafeAt(c, v)
   BY DEF Ballot
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF SafeAtBody

LEMMA SafeAtSound ==
  \A b \in Ballot : \A v \in Value :
     SafeAt(b, v) => \A c \in 0..(b-1) : \A w \in Value : ChosenIn(c, w) => (w = v)

<1>1. \A n \in Nat : (\A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)) => P(n)
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)
               PROVE  P(n)
      OBVIOUS
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value, SafeAt(n, v),
                       NEW c \in 0..(n-1), NEW w \in Value, ChosenIn(c, w)
               PROVE  w = v
      BY DEF P
   <2>1. n # 0
      OBVIOUS
   <2>2. \E Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :

                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>1, SafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
   <2>3. PICK Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                 /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>2
   <2>4. PICK cc \in -1..(n-1) :
            /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                  VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
            /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>3
   <2>5. PICK Qc \in Quorum : \A a \in Qc : VotedFor(a, c, w)
      BY DEF ChosenIn
   <2>6. \E a \in Q : a \in Qc
      BY <2>3, <2>5, QA
   <2>7. PICK astar \in Q : astar \in Qc
      BY <2>6
   <2>8. VotedFor(astar, c, w)
      BY <2>5, <2>7
   <2>9. ~(c \in (cc+1)..(n-1))
      <3>1. ASSUME c \in (cc+1)..(n-1) PROVE FALSE
         <4>1. DidNotVoteIn(astar, c)
            BY <2>4, <2>7, <3>1
         <4>2. QED
            BY <4>1, <2>8 DEF DidNotVoteIn
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>10. c \leq cc
      BY <2>4, <2>9
   <2>11. cc # -1
      BY <2>10
   <2>12. /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
          /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value : VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
      BY <2>4, <2>11
   <2>13. CASE c = cc
      BY <2>7, <2>8, <2>12, <2>13
   <2>14. CASE c < cc
      <3>1. cc \in 0..(n-1)

      <3>2. P(cc)

      <3>3. SafeAt(cc, v) =>

      <3>4. c \in 0..(cc-1)
         BY <2>14
      <3>5. QED
         BY <2>12, <3>3, <3>4
   <2>15. QED
      BY <2>10, <2>13, <2>14
<1>2. \A n \in Nat : P(n)
   <2> DEFINE f == [k \in Nat |-> \A m \in 0..k : P(m)]

                /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq b

  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW MB2, NEW VT2,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB[a] \in Int,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB2[a] \in Int,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB[a] \leq MB2[a],

tool_use_result.originalFile:
----------------------------- MODULE Scratch ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

LOCAL INSTANCE NaturalsInduction

SafeAtBody(SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : VotedFor(a,c,w) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a,d)

\* State-parametric version of the SafeAt body: MB plays the role of maxBal,
\* VT the role of votes.  Its definition mentions no state variable, so
\* (GSafeAt(maxBal,votes,b,v))' = GSafeAt(maxBal',votes',b,v) by argument priming.
GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]

GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) ==
   LET SA[bb \in Ballot] == GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v)
   IN  SA[b]

LEMMA SafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == SafeAtBody(g, n, v)
           SA[bb \in Nat] == Def(SA, bb)
<1>1. ASSUME NEW mm \in Nat, NEW gg, NEW hh, \A i \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[i] = hh[i]
      PROVE  Def(gg, mm) = Def(hh, mm)
   <2>0. \A c \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[c] = hh[c]
      BY <1>1
   <2>1. SafeAtBody(gg, mm, v) = SafeAtBody(hh, mm, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>0 DEF SafeAtBody
   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = SafeAt(bb, v)
   BY DEF SafeAt, SafeAtBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]
   BY <1>1, RecursiveFcnOfNat, Isa
<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = SafeAtBody(SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

LEMMA SafeAtUnfold ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) <=>
           \/ b = 0
           \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
                /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
                /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                     /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                          VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                     /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
<1>1. SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
   BY SafeAtDef
<1>2. \A c \in 0..(b-1) : [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)][c] = SafeAt(c, v)
   BY DEF Ballot
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF SafeAtBody

LEMMA SafeAtSound ==
  \A b \in Ballot : \A v \in Value :
     SafeAt(b, v) => \A c \in 0..(b-1) : \A w \in Value : ChosenIn(c, w) => (w = v)
<1> DEFINE P(bb) == \A vv \in Value :
                       SafeAt(bb, vv) =>
                          \A cc \in 0..(bb-1) : \A ww \in Value :
                             ChosenIn(cc, ww) => (ww = vv)
<1>1. \A n \in Nat : (\A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)) => P(n)
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)
               PROVE  P(n)
      OBVIOUS
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value, SafeAt(n, v),
                       NEW c \in 0..(n-1), NEW w \in Value, ChosenIn(c, w)
               PROVE  w = v
      BY DEF P
   <2>1. n # 0
      OBVIOUS
   <2>2. \E Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                 /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>1, SafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
   <2>3. PICK Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                 /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>2
   <2>4. PICK cc \in -1..(n-1) :
            /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                  VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
            /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>3
   <2>5. PICK Qc \in Quorum : \A a \in Qc : VotedFor(a, c, w)
      BY DEF ChosenIn
   <2>6. \E a \in Q : a \in Qc
      BY <2>3, <2>5, QA
   <2>7. PICK astar \in Q : astar \in Qc
      BY <2>6
   <2>8. VotedFor(astar, c, w)
      BY <2>5, <2>7
   <2>9. ~(c \in (cc+1)..(n-1))
      <3>1. ASSUME c \in (cc+1)..(n-1) PROVE FALSE
         <4>1. DidNotVoteIn(astar, c)
            BY <2>4, <2>7, <3>1
         <4>2. QED
            BY <4>1, <2>8 DEF DidNotVoteIn
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>10. c \leq cc
      BY <2>4, <2>9
   <2>11. cc # -1
      BY <2>10
   <2>12. /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
          /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value : VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
      BY <2>4, <2>11
   <2>13. CASE c = cc
      BY <2>7, <2>8, <2>12, <2>13
   <2>14. CASE c < cc
      <3>1. cc \in 0..(n-1)
         BY <2>4, <2>11
      <3>2. P(cc)
         BY <3>1
      <3>3. SafeAt(cc, v) =>
               \A c1 \in 0..(cc-1) : \A ww \in Value : ChosenIn(c1, ww) => (ww = v)
         BY <3>2 DEF P
      <3>4. c \in 0..(cc-1)
         BY <2>14
      <3>5. QED
         BY <2>12, <3>3, <3>4
   <2>15. QED
      BY <2>10, <2>13, <2>14
<1>2. \A n \in Nat : P(n)
   <2> DEFINE f == [k \in Nat |-> \A m \in 0..k : P(m)]
   <2>1. \A k \in Nat : f[k] = (\A m \in 0..k : P(m))
      BY DEF f
   <2>2. f[0]
      BY <1>1, <2>1
   <2>3. \A k \in Nat : f[k] => f[k+1]
      <3>1. ASSUME NEW k \in Nat, f[k] PROVE f[k+1]
         <4>1. \A m \in 0..k : P(m)
            BY <3>1, <2>1
         <4>2. P(k+1)
            BY <1>1, <4>1
         <4>3. \A m \in 0..(k+1) : P(m)
            BY <4>1, <4>2
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>3, <2>1
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>4. \A k \in Nat : f[k]
      BY <2>2, <2>3, SimpleNatInduction
   <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <2>1
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>2 DEF Ballot

LEMMA GSafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) =
            GBody(MB, VT, [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)], b, v)
<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == GBody(MB, VT, g, n, v)
           SA[bb \in Nat] == Def(SA, bb)
<1>1. ASSUME NEW mm \in Nat, NEW gg, NEW hh, \A i \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[i] = hh[i]
      PROVE  Def(gg, mm) = Def(hh, mm)
   <2>0. \A c \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[c] = hh[c]
      BY <1>1
   <2>1. GBody(MB, VT, gg, mm, v) = GBody(MB, VT, hh, mm, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>0 DEF GBody
   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)
   BY DEF GSafeAt, GBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]
   BY <1>1, RecursiveFcnOfNat, Isa
<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = GBody(MB, VT, SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

LEMMA GSafeAtUnfold ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) <=>
           \/ b = 0
           \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
                /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq b
                /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                     /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                          (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                     /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                           <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
<1>1. GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) =
         GBody(MB, VT, [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)], b, v)
   BY GSafeAtDef
<1>2. \A c \in 0..(b-1) : [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)][c] = GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
   BY DEF Ballot
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF GBody

LEMMA SafeAtIsG ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) = GSafeAt(maxBal, votes, b, v)
BY DEF SafeAt, GSafeAt, SafeAtBody, GBody, VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn

LEMMA SafeAtIsGPrime ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)' = GSafeAt(maxBal', votes', b, v)
BY DEF SafeAt, GSafeAt, SafeAtBody, GBody, VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn

LEMMA GSafeStable ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW MB2, NEW VT2,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB[a] \in Int,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB2[a] \in Int,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB[a] \leq MB2[a],
         \A a \in Acceptor, e \in Ballot, w \in Value :
            (<<e, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (<<e, w>> \in VT[a] \/ MB[a] \leq e)
  PROVE  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
            GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) => GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, b, v)
<1> DEFINE P(bb) == \A vv \in Value :
                       GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, vv) => GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, bb, vv)
<1>1. \A n \in Nat : (\A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)) => P(n)
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)
               PROVE  P(n)
      OBVIOUS
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value, GSafeAt(MB, VT, n, v)
               PROVE  GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, n, v)
      BY DEF P
   <2>1. CASE n = 0
      BY <2>1, GSafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
   <2>2. CASE n # 0
      <3>1. \E Q \in Quorum :
               /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq n
               /\ \E c \in -1..(n-1) :
                    /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                   /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                         (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                    /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
         BY <2>2, GSafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
      <3>2. PICK Q \in Quorum :
               /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq n
               /\ \E c \in -1..(n-1) :
                    /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                   /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                         (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                    /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
         BY <3>1
      <3>3. PICK c \in -1..(n-1) :
               /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                              /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
               /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
         BY <3>2
      <3>4. \A a \in Q : a \in Acceptor
         BY <3>2, QA
      <3>5. \A a \in Q : MB2[a] \geq n
         BY <3>2, <3>4
      <3>6. (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, c, v)
                        /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
         <4> SUFFICES ASSUME c # -1 PROVE
                /\ GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, c, v)
                /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
            OBVIOUS
         <4>0. c \in 0..(n-1)
            BY <3>3
         <4>1. /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
               /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
            BY <3>3
         <4>2. GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, c, v)
            <5>1. P(c)
               BY <4>0
            <5>2. QED
               BY <4>1, <5>1 DEF P
         <4>3. \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
            <5>1. ASSUME NEW a \in Q, NEW w \in Value, <<c, w>> \in VT2[a]
                  PROVE  w = v
               <6>1. a \in Acceptor
                  BY <3>4, <5>1
               <6>2. MB[a] \geq n
                  BY <3>2, <5>1
               <6>3. ~(MB[a] \leq c)
                  BY <4>0, <6>1, <6>2
               <6>4. c \in Ballot
                  BY <4>0 DEF Ballot
               <6>5. <<c, w>> \in VT[a]
                  BY <5>1, <6>1, <6>3, <6>4
               <6>6. QED
                  BY <4>1, <5>1, <6>5
            <5>2. QED
               BY <5>1
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>2, <4>3
      <3>7. \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT2[a]
         <4>1. ASSUME NEW d \in (c+1)..(n-1), NEW a \in Q, NEW w \in Value
               PROVE  <<d, w>> \notin VT2[a]
            <5>1. a \in Acceptor
               BY <3>4, <4>1
            <5>2. MB[a] \geq n
               BY <3>2, <4>1
            <5>3. ~(MB[a] \leq d)
               BY <4>1, <5>1, <5>2
            <5>4. <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
               BY <3>3, <4>1
            <5>5. d \in Ballot
               BY <4>1 DEF Ballot
            <5>6. QED
               BY <4>1, <5>1, <5>3, <5>4, <5>5
         <4>2. QED
            BY <4>1
      <3>8. \E QQ \in Quorum :
               /\ \A a \in QQ : MB2[a] \geq n
               /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                    /\ (cc # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, cc, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in QQ : \A w \in Value :
                                          (<<cc, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
                    /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in QQ : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT2[a]
         BY <3>2, <3>3, <3>5, <3>6, <3>7
      <3>9. QED
         BY <2>2, <3>8, GSafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
   <2>3. QED
      BY <2>1, <2>2
<1>2. \A n \in Nat : P(n)
   <2> DEFINE f == [k \in Nat |-> \A m \in 0..k : P(m)]
   <2>1. \A k \in Nat : f[k] = (\A m \in 0..k : P(m))
      BY DEF f
   <2>2. f[0]
      BY <1>1, <2>1
   <2>3. \A k \in Nat : f[k] => f[k+1]
      <3>1. ASSUME NEW k \in Nat, f[k] PROVE f[k+1]
         <4>1. \A m \in 0..k : P(m)
            BY <3>1, <2>1
         <4>2. P(k+1)
            BY <1>1, <4>1
         <4>3. \A m \in 0..(k+1) : P(m)
            BY <4>1, <4>2
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>3, <2>1
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>4. \A k \in Nat : f[k]
      BY <2>2, <2>3, SimpleNatInduction
   <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <2>1
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>2 DEF Ballot

THEOREM VT3 == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF OMITTED
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

===============================================================================

lines: GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) => GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, b, v)
GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, vv) => GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, bb, vv)
<2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)

----------------------------- MODULE Scratch ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

LOCAL INSTANCE NaturalsInduction

SafeAtBody(SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : VotedFor(a,c,w) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a,d)

\* State-parametric version of the SafeAt body: MB plays the role of maxBal,
\* VT the role of votes.  Its definition mentions no state variable, so
\* (GSafeAt(maxBal,votes,b,v))' = GSafeAt(maxBal',votes',b,v) by argument priming.
GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]

GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) ==
   LET SA[bb \in Ballot] == GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v)
   IN  SA[b]

LEMMA SafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == SafeAtBody(g, n, v)
           SA[bb \in Nat] == Def(SA, bb)
<1>1. ASSUME NEW mm \in Nat, NEW gg, NEW hh, \A i \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[i] = hh[i]
      PROVE  Def(gg, mm) = Def(hh, mm)
   <2>0. \A c \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[c] = hh[c]
      BY <1>1
   <2>1. SafeAtBody(gg, mm, v) = SafeAtBody(hh, mm, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>0 DEF SafeAtBody
   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = SafeAt(bb, v)
   BY DEF SafeAt, SafeAtBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]
   BY <1>1, RecursiveFcnOfNat, Isa
<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = SafeAtBody(SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

LEMMA SafeAtUnfold ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) <=>
           \/ b = 0
           \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
                /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
                /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                     /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                          VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                     /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
<1>1. SafeAt(b, v) = SafeAtBody([bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)], b, v)
   BY SafeAtDef
<1>2. \A c \in 0..(b-1) : [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)][c] = SafeAt(c, v)
   BY DEF Ballot
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF SafeAtBody

LEMMA SafeAtSound ==
  \A b \in Ballot : \A v \in Value :
     SafeAt(b, v) => \A c \in 0..(b-1) : \A w \in Value : ChosenIn(c, w) => (w = v)
<1> DEFINE P(bb) == \A vv \in Value :
                       SafeAt(bb, vv) =>
                          \A cc \in 0..(bb-1) : \A ww \in Value :
                             ChosenIn(cc, ww) => (ww = vv)
<1>1. \A n \in Nat : (\A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)) => P(n)
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)
               PROVE  P(n)
      OBVIOUS
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value, SafeAt(n, v),
                       NEW c \in 0..(n-1), NEW w \in Value, ChosenIn(c, w)
               PROVE  w = v
      BY DEF P
   <2>1. n # 0
      OBVIOUS
   <2>2. \E Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                 /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>1, SafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
   <2>3. PICK Q \in Quorum :
            /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq n
            /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                 /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                                 /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                       VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
                 /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>2
   <2>4. PICK cc \in -1..(n-1) :
            /\ (cc # -1) => /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value :
                                  VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
            /\ \A d \in (cc+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
      BY <2>3
   <2>5. PICK Qc \in Quorum : \A a \in Qc : VotedFor(a, c, w)
      BY DEF ChosenIn
   <2>6. \E a \in Q : a \in Qc
      BY <2>3, <2>5, QA
   <2>7. PICK astar \in Q : astar \in Qc
      BY <2>6
   <2>8. VotedFor(astar, c, w)
      BY <2>5, <2>7
   <2>9. ~(c \in (cc+1)..(n-1))
      <3>1. ASSUME c \in (cc+1)..(n-1) PROVE FALSE
         <4>1. DidNotVoteIn(astar, c)
            BY <2>4, <2>7, <3>1
         <4>2. QED
            BY <4>1, <2>8 DEF DidNotVoteIn
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>10. c \leq cc
      BY <2>4, <2>9
   <2>11. cc # -1
      BY <2>10
   <2>12. /\ SafeAt(cc, v)
          /\ \A a \in Q : \A ww \in Value : VotedFor(a, cc, ww) => (ww = v)
      BY <2>4, <2>11
   <2>13. CASE c = cc
      BY <2>7, <2>8, <2>12, <2>13
   <2>14. CASE c < cc
      <3>1. cc \in 0..(n-1)
         BY <2>4, <2>11
      <3>2. P(cc)
         BY <3>1
      <3>3. SafeAt(cc, v) =>
               \A c1 \in 0..(cc-1) : \A ww \in Value : ChosenIn(c1, ww) => (ww = v)
         BY <3>2 DEF P
      <3>4. c \in 0..(cc-1)
         BY <2>14
      <3>5. QED
         BY <2>12, <3>3, <3>4
   <2>15. QED
      BY <2>10, <2>13, <2>14
<1>2. \A n \in Nat : P(n)
   <2> DEFINE f == [k \in Nat |-> \A m \in 0..k : P(m)]
   <2>1. \A k \in Nat : f[k] = (\A m \in 0..k : P(m))
      BY DEF f
   <2>2. f[0]
      BY <1>1, <2>1
   <2>3. \A k \in Nat : f[k] => f[k+1]
      <3>1. ASSUME NEW k \in Nat, f[k] PROVE f[k+1]
         <4>1. \A m \in 0..k : P(m)
            BY <3>1, <2>1
         <4>2. P(k+1)
            BY <1>1, <4>1
         <4>3. \A m \in 0..(k+1) : P(m)
            BY <4>1, <4>2
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>3, <2>1
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>4. \A k \in Nat : f[k]
      BY <2>2, <2>3, SimpleNatInduction
   <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <2>1
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>2 DEF Ballot

LEMMA GSafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) =
            GBody(MB, VT, [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)], b, v)
<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == GBody(MB, VT, g, n, v)
           SA[bb \in Nat] == Def(SA, bb)
<1>1. ASSUME NEW mm \in Nat, NEW gg, NEW hh, \A i \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[i] = hh[i]
      PROVE  Def(gg, mm) = Def(hh, mm)
   <2>0. \A c \in 0..(mm-1) : gg[c] = hh[c]
      BY <1>1
   <2>1. GBody(MB, VT, gg, mm, v) = GBody(MB, VT, hh, mm, v)
      BY <1>1, <2>0 DEF GBody
   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)
   BY DEF GSafeAt, GBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]
   BY <1>1, RecursiveFcnOfNat, Isa
<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = GBody(MB, VT, SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

LEMMA GSafeAtUnfold ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) <=>
           \/ b = 0
           \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
                /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq b
                /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                     /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                          (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                     /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                           <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
<1>1. GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) =
         GBody(MB, VT, [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)], b, v)
   BY GSafeAtDef
<1>2. \A c \in 0..(b-1) : [bb \in Ballot |-> GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, v)][c] = GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
   BY DEF Ballot
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF GBody

LEMMA SafeAtIsG ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v) = GSafeAt(maxBal, votes, b, v)
BY DEF SafeAt, GSafeAt, SafeAtBody, GBody, VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn

LEMMA SafeAtIsGPrime ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)' = GSafeAt(maxBal', votes', b, v)
BY DEF SafeAt, GSafeAt, SafeAtBody, GBody, VotedFor, DidNotVoteIn

LEMMA GSafeStable ==
  ASSUME NEW MB, NEW VT, NEW MB2, NEW VT2,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB[a] \in Int,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB2[a] \in Int,
         \A a \in Acceptor : MB[a] \leq MB2[a],
         \A a \in Acceptor, e \in Ballot, w \in Value :
            (<<e, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (<<e, w>> \in VT[a] \/ MB[a] \leq e)
  PROVE  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
            GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) => GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, b, v)
<1> DEFINE P(bb) == \A vv \in Value :
                       GSafeAt(MB, VT, bb, vv) => GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, bb, vv)
<1> HIDE DEF GSafeAt
<1>1. \A n \in Nat : (\A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)) => P(n)
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW n \in Nat, \A m \in 0..(n-1) : P(m)
               PROVE  P(n)
      OBVIOUS
   <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value, GSafeAt(MB, VT, n, v)
               PROVE  GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, n, v)
      BY DEF P
   <2>1. CASE n = 0
      BY <2>1, GSafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
   <2>2. CASE n # 0
      <3>1. \E Q \in Quorum :
               /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq n
               /\ \E c \in -1..(n-1) :
                    /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                   /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                         (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                    /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
         BY <2>2, GSafeAtUnfold DEF Ballot
      <3>2. PICK Q \in Quorum :
               /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq n
               /\ \E c \in -1..(n-1) :
                    /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                                   /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value :
                                         (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
                    /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
         BY <3>1
      <3>3. PICK c \in -1..(n-1) :
               /\ (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
                              /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
               /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
         BY <3>2
      <3>4. \A a \in Q : a \in Acceptor
         BY <3>2, QA
      <3>5. \A a \in Q : MB2[a] \geq n
         BY <3>2, <3>4
      <3>6. (c # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, c, v)
                        /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
         <4> SUFFICES ASSUME c # -1 PROVE
                /\ GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, c, v)
                /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
            OBVIOUS
         <4>0. c \in 0..(n-1)
            BY <3>3
         <4>1. /\ GSafeAt(MB, VT, c, v)
               /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
            BY <3>3
         <4>2. GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, c, v)
            <5>1. P(c)
               BY <4>0
            <5>2. QED
               BY <4>1, <5>1 DEF P
         <4>3. \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT2[a]) => (w = v)
            <5>1. ASSUME NEW a \in Q, NEW w \in Value, <<c, w>> \in VT2[a]
                  PROVE  w = v
               <6>1. a \in Acceptor
                  BY <3>4, <5>1
               <6>2. MB[a] \geq n
                  BY <3>2, <5>1
               <6>3. ~(MB[a] \leq c)
                  BY <4>0, <6>1, <6>2
               <6>4. c \in Ballot
                  BY <4>0 DEF Ballot
               <6>5. <<c, w>> \in VT[a]
                  BY <5>1, <6>1, <6>3, <6>4
               <6>6. QED
                  BY <4>1, <5>1, <6>5
            <5>2. QED
               BY <5>1
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>2, <4>3
      <3>7. \A d \in (c+1)..(n-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT2[a]
         <4>1. ASSUME NEW d \in (c+1)..(n-1), NEW a \in Q, NEW w \in Value
               PROVE  <<d, w>> \notin VT2[a]
            <5>1. a \in Acceptor
               BY <3>4, <4>1
            <5>2. MB[a] \geq n
               BY <3>2, <4>1
            <5>3. ~(MB[a] \leq d)
               BY <4>1, <5>1, <5>2
            <5>4. <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]
               BY <3>3, <4>1
            <5>5. d \in Ballot
               BY <4>1 DEF Ballot
            <5>6. QED
               BY <4>1, <5>1, <5>3, <5>4, <5>5
         <4>2. QED
            BY <4>1
      <3>8. \E QQ \in Quorum :
               /\ \A a \in QQ : MB2[a] \geq n
               /\ \E cc \in -1..(n-1) :
                    /\ (cc # -1) => /\ GSafeAt(MB2, VT2, cc, v)
                                    /\ \A a \in QQ : \A w \in Value :

----------------------------- MODULE Scratch ------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

C == INSTANCE Consensus

LOCAL INSTANCE NaturalsInduction

SafeAtBody(SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : VotedFor(a,c,w) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a,d)

\* State-parametric version of the SafeAt body: MB plays the role of maxBal,
\* VT the role of votes.  Its definition mentions no state variable, so
\* (GSafeAt(maxBal,votes,b,v))' = GSafeAt(maxBal',votes',b,v) by argument priming.
GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v) ==
   \/ bb = 0
   \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
        /\ \A a \in Q : MB[a] \geq bb
        /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
             /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                            /\ \A a \in Q : \A w \in Value : (<<c, w>> \in VT[a]) => (w = v)
             /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : \A w \in Value : <<d, w>> \notin VT[a]

GSafeAt(MB, VT, b, v) ==
   LET SA[bb \in Ballot] == GBody(MB, VT, SA, bb, v)
   IN  SA[b]

LEMMA SafeAtDef ==
  ASSUME NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value

<1> DEFINE Def(g, n) == SafeAtBody(g, n, v)

   <2>1. SafeAtBody(gg, mm, v) = SafeAtBody(hh, mm, v)

   <2>2. QED
      BY <2>1 DEF Def
<1>2. \A bb \in Nat : SA[bb] = SafeAt(bb, v)
   BY DEF SafeAt, SafeAtBody, Def, Ballot
<1> HIDE DEF Def
<1>3. SA = [bb \in Nat |-> Def(SA, bb)]

<1> USE DEF Def
<1>4. SA[b] = SafeAtBody(SA, b, v)
   BY <1>3 DEF Def, Ballot
<1>5. SA = [bb \in Ballot |-> SafeAt(bb, v)]
   BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF Ballot
<1>6. QED
   BY <1>2, <1>4, <1>5 DEF Ballot

<1>3. QED

   <2>3. \A k \in Nat : f[k] => f[k+1]
      <3>1. ASSUME NEW k \in Nat, f[k] PROVE f[k+1]
         <4>1. \A m \in 0..k : P(m)
            BY <3>1, <2>1
         <4>2. P(k+1)
            BY <1>1, <4>1
         <4>3. \A m \in 0..(k+1) : P(m)
            BY <4>1, <4>2
         <4>4. QED
            BY <4>3, <2>1
      <3>2. QED BY <3>1
   <2>4. \A k \in Nat : f[k]
      BY <2>2, <2>3, SimpleNatInduction
   <2>5. QED
      BY <2>4, <2>1
<1>3. QED
   BY <1>2 DEF Ballot

THEOREM VT3 == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF OMITTED
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
